title: ArticleEnriched
description: Payload for navi.{env}.events.articles.enriched. Published by digest/enricher after entity extraction is complete and the enriched article has been written to Postgres.

article_id.description: UUID v4 of the article in the articles table. References the article_id from the corresponding articles.collected event.

topics.description: Conceptual topics extracted from the article by Claude. Empty array when degraded=true.

confidence.description: Claude's confidence in this topic assignment, 0.0–1.0.

entities.description: Named entities extracted from the article by Claude. Empty array when degraded=true. Used by the Rolodex feature to build company and person profiles.

name.description: Entity name as it appears in the article (e.g. 'JPMorgan Chase', 'Jane Fraser').

type.description: Entity classification. 'company' and 'person' are the primary types consumed by the Rolodex feature.

confidence.description: Claude's confidence in this entity extraction, 0.0–1.0.

enriched_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when enrichment completed.

degraded.description: True if enrichment was skipped due to ErrBudgetExceeded or a Claude API failure after retries. When true, topics and entities are empty arrays and the article is stored with no entity links.
